positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for barutin_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~located_in(X0,snow_island) | located_in(X0,south_shetland_islands)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~located_in(X1,X2) | ~located_in(X0,X1) | located_in(X0,X2)).

cnf(u13,axiom,
    snow_island != south_shetland_islands).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~located_in(X0,barutin_cove) | located_in(X0,snow_island)).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    snow_island != antarctica).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~located_in(X0,barutin_cove) | located_in(X0,antarctica)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    barutin_cove != south_shetland_islands).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    located_in(barutin_cove,snow_island)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    ~located_in(X0,barutin_cove) | located_in(X0,south_shetland_islands)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    barutin_cove != antarctica).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    barutin_cove != snow_island).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    located_in(barutin_cove,south_shetland_islands)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    located_in(south_shetland_islands,antarctica)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    located_in(snow_island,south_shetland_islands)).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    south_shetland_islands != antarctica).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    located_in(snow_island,antarctica)).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    located_in(barutin_cove,antarctica)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    ~located_in(X0,snow_island) | located_in(X0,antarctica)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~located_in(X0,south_shetland_islands) | located_in(X0,antarctica)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for barutin_negative
% SZS output start Proof for barutin_negative
2. located_in(barutin_cove,snow_island) [input(axiom)]
3. located_in(snow_island,south_shetland_islands) [input(axiom)]
4. located_in(south_shetland_islands,antarctica) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0,X1,X2] : ((located_in(X0,X1) & located_in(X1,X2)) => located_in(X0,X2)) [input(axiom)]
6. located_in(barutin_cove,antarctica) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~located_in(barutin_cove,antarctica) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ~located_in(barutin_cove,antarctica) [flattening 7]
9. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (located_in(X0,X2) | (~located_in(X0,X1) | ~located_in(X1,X2))) [ennf transformation 5]
10. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (located_in(X0,X2) | ~located_in(X0,X1) | ~located_in(X1,X2)) [flattening 9]
17. located_in(barutin_cove,snow_island) [cnf transformation 2]
18. located_in(snow_island,south_shetland_islands) [cnf transformation 3]
19. located_in(south_shetland_islands,antarctica) [cnf transformation 4]
20. ~located_in(X1,X2) | ~located_in(X0,X1) | located_in(X0,X2) [cnf transformation 10]
21. ~located_in(barutin_cove,antarctica) [cnf transformation 8]
23. ~located_in(X0,snow_island) | located_in(X0,south_shetland_islands) [resolution 20,18]
24. ~located_in(X0,south_shetland_islands) | located_in(X0,antarctica) [resolution 20,19]
25. located_in(barutin_cove,south_shetland_islands) [resolution 23,17]
27. located_in(barutin_cove,antarctica) [resolution 25,24]
29. $false [forward subsumption resolution 27,21]
% SZS output end Proof for barutin_negative
% Termination reason: Refutation
